heading: Local currency accounts
label: 1727d Local currency accounts

children.text: local currencies are to be programmed for specific economic development purposes listed in ; andsection 1727e(a) of this title
the recipient country programs an equivalent amount of money for such purposes as specified in an agreement entered into by the Administrator and the recipient country.

children.heading: Ownership and programming of accounts
children.label: b Ownership and programming of accounts
children.text: The proceeds of sales pursuant to shall be the property of the recipient country or the United States, as specified in the applicable agreement. Such proceeds shall be utilized for the benefit of the recipient country, shall be jointly programmed by the Administrator and the government of the recipient country, and shall be disbursed for the benefit of such country in accordance with local currency agreements between the Administrator and that government.section 1727c(2) of this title

children.heading: Overall development strategy
children.label: c Overall development strategy
children.text: The Administrator shall consider the local currency proceeds as an integral part of the overall development strategy of the Agency for International Development and the recipient country.
